oretory.configuration.title: Oretory Config
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_1: The Andesite Miner can be placed directly on top of any Ore block
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_2: Place any Fuel source into the Andesite Miner's input slot to power it
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_3: Once fuelled, the Andesite Miner continuously produces Raw Ore without ever breaking the block
oretory.ponder.miner_basic.text_4: Next: Mining from two Ore blocks at once, and Redstone control
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_1: Place an Ore block above the Andesite Miner to extract from both sides simultaneously
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_2: Dual extraction uses 2x Fuel per cycle, but produces 2x Raw Ore in return
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_3: A Redstone signal will instantly pause the Andesite Miner
oretory.ponder.miner_redstone.text_4: Next: Fully automated Fuel input and Ore output
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_1: A Chest stocked with Fuel feeds the Andesite Miner automatically via a Funnel and Mechanical Belt
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_2: The Andesite Miner runs continuously as long as it is supplied with Fuel
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_3: A Funnel on the output side pulls Raw Ore out and delivers it to a storage Chest via Belt
oretory.ponder.miner_automation.text_4: With this setup the Andesite Miner runs indefinitely, completely hands-free
oretory.ponder.advanced_miner_basic.head: Dual Ore Extraction
oretory.ponder.advanced_miner_basic.text: The Brass Miner works like the Andesite Miner, but with two separate output slots
Place different Ore blocks above and below — each ore goes to its own output slot
It consumes 2 Fuel per cycle and runs ~1.5x faster than the Andesite Miner
Mixed ores are separated automatically — no sorter needed downstream
oretory.ponder.advanced_miner_output.tex: Each output slot has its own release threshold — set how many items must accumulate before funnels can pull
A funnel on the bottom face pulls exclusively from the bottom ore slot
A funnel on a side face alternates between both output slots automatically
With two side funnels, each funnel takes from a different slot in round-robin fashion
